name: risk managers in accounting firms processing 5–15 clients/month tool
description: For risk managers in accounting firms processing 5–15 clients/month, inadequate threat cataloging causes increased risk exposure. We provide a centralized platform instead of manual spreadsheets and disparate tools.
target_audience: risk managers in accounting firms processing 5–15 clients/month
problem_solved: Inadequate threat cataloging and control management leads to increased risk exposure.
